Appearances:
Plaintiff, Petra Mofazelli is present.
Attorney, Daniel M. Bornstein is appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Albert Palacios and Lise Parenteau are present.
Attorney, Alexander M. Merchant is representing the defendants.

The Judge Pro Tem Elam Lambert, litigants and counsel meet and confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle. The trial date of November 25, 2013 remains on calendar.
